GM:(0,0,0)  R:(1/2,1/2,-1/2)  RA:(1/2,-1/2,-1/2)  S:(1/2,1/2,0)  SA:(1/2,-1/2,0)  T:(1,0,1/2)  Y:(1,0,0)  Z:(0,0,1/2)
GM:(0,0,0)  C:(1/2,1/2,0)  D:(0,1/2,1/2)  Y:(1/2,0,0)  B:(0,0,1/2)  E:(1/2,1/2,1/2)  A:(1/2,0,1/2)  Z:(0,1/2,0)
GM1+  GM1-  GM2+  GM2-  GM4  GM6  GM3  GM5  (R)C1+  (R)C1-  (R)C2+  (R)C2-  (R)C4  (R)C6  (R)C3  (R)C5  (RA)D1-  (RA)D1+  (RA)D2-  (RA)D2+  (RA)D4  (RA)D6  (RA)D3  (RA)D5  (S)Y1+  (S)Y1-  (S)Y2+  (S)Y2-  (S)Y4  (S)Y6  (S)Y3  (S)Y5  (SA)B1+  (SA)B1-  (SA)B2+  (SA)B2-  (SA)B4  (SA)B6  (SA)B3  (SA)B5  (T)E1-E1+  (T)E2-E2+  (T)E4E6  (T)E3E5  (Y)A1+  (Y)A1-  (Y)A2+  (Y)A2-  (Y)A4  (Y)A6  (Y)A3  (Y)A5  Z1-Z1+  Z2-Z2+  Z4Z6  Z3Z5
